response.justification: Bogdan Szabo has extensive software development experience (19+ years) and demonstrates strong technical leadership through open-source contributions, mentorship, and organizational change (e.g., setting up CI/CD infrastructure, TDD workshops). While his experience in developer tools and build systems is evident (e.g., MCP code generators, Fluent-Asserts library), his people management experience is less explicitly documented, though his roles as a staff engineer and founder imply leadership. His mobile platform knowledge is limited to iOS/Apple TV development, which may not fully align with the role's mobile ecosystem focus.
strengths: Deep technical expertise across multiple languages (JavaScript/TypeScript, D, C++, etc.) and domains (web, mobile, embedded systems)
Proven track record in developer tooling and automation (MCP, Fluent-Asserts, CI/CD setup)
Strong leadership and mentorship experience (TDD workshops, Code Katas, team leadership roles)
concerns: Limited explicit experience in managing teams of 3+ people (roles emphasize individual contributor or founder status)
Mobile-platform knowledge is sparse (only iOS/Apple TV experience, no Android or broader mobile ecosystem work)
No direct experience with compilers, build systems, or testing infrastructure at scale for mobile platforms
